$comment: Anchor manifest for the bundled Clarion LSP server (GitHub #40 — LSP snapshot drift). The bundled server (lsp-server/out/server/...) is a build artifact of msarson/Clarion-Extension with OUR CodeGraph overlay applied on top. This file records what the deployed snapshot is pinned to and the target tag to sync toward, so the pin is a reliable anchor instead of a hand-maintained mystery. Consumed by Sync-LspServer.ps1. See lsp-server-sync/README.md.

codeGraphOverlay.description: OUR patch on top of upstream. The two overlay .ts files are UNTRACKED in the upstream clone (out/ is gitignored too), so they SURVIVE `git checkout <tag>` and do NOT need re-copying. Only the server.ts wiring (a tracked file with our uncommitted edits) must be re-applied onto the new tag's server.ts.

targetPin.note: Tag to sync toward; -Tag overrides. AUTO-UPDATED to the last successfully synced tag by Sync-LspServer.ps1 -- edit by hand only to stage a pin to a NEWER release before running the sync.

currentPin.note: AUTO-UPDATED by Sync-LspServer.ps1 on each successful sync -- the observed state of the just-synced checkout. Historical hand-audit notes live in git history (pre-#77 revisions of this file).
